name: Macadamia-Mocha Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well and pat into bottom and sides of 10-inch springform pan.
2. FILLING
- 1 cup SUGAR
- 4 JUMBO EGGS, SHELLED
- Warm in microwave for 25 seconds.
- 24 oz CREAM CHEESE, unwrapped
- Warm in microwave for 2 minutes.
- 8 oz SEMI-SWEET CHOCOLATE, melted
- 1 tbsp INSTANT COFFEE, dissolved in 1 tbsp WATER (hot)
- 2 tbsp UNSWEETENED COCOA
- 1 tsp VANILLA
- 3 cup SOUR CREAM
- 3/4 cup MACADAMIA NUTS, chopped
- 4 tbsp BUTTER, melted
CRUST
